creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #3)

===>   Registering installation for py39-black-22.10.0
Installing py39-black-22.10.0...
pkg-static: py39-black-22.10.0 conflicts with py39-nbformat-5.6.1_1 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__init__.py
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/py-black

===>>> Installation of py39-black-22.10.0 (devel/py-black@py39) failed
===>>> Aborting update


===>>> You can restart from the point of failure with this command line:
       portmaster <flags> devel/py-black@py39 

This command has been saved to ~/portmasterfail.txt

better then the conflicts pointed out in comment #2, and probably an issue with py-black and py-nbformat
